title: 8 Pet Projects
excerpt: Since it’s National Pet Week, I went through all the tutorials I have bookmarked so I could share with you a bunch of fun and easy DIY pet projects! Some of these projects are ones I’ve completed already, some are ones I have on my “to-make” list. All are awesome! Pull up a chair, grab […]
content:
Since it’s National Pet Week, I went through all the tutorials I have bookmarked so I could share with you a bunch of fun and easy DIY pet projects! Some of these projects are ones I’ve completed already, some are ones I have on my “to-make” list. All are awesome! Pull up a chair, grab your supplies, and get started on a craft project designed just for your favorite furry friend!

Want to learn how to make an amazing project pictured above? Find it’s link below!

  1. Cozy Catnip Kitty Pillow by Katie Crafts
  2. Cat Bow Tie & Pattern by jessyratfink on Instructables
  3. Reversible Dog Bandanas by Gleeful Things
  4. Pet Pouches by The b-line
  5. Door Hanger Bouncy Cat Toy by Lion Brand
  6. DIY Dog Treats by A Creative Cookie
  7. Knit Sweater For A Guinea Pig by Doggie Stylish
  8. Pet ID Tag by Martha Stewart

Don’t forget to send in your pet’s photo and bio to Katie Crafts to include him or her in the Katie Crafts Reader’s Pet Round Up this Saturday! Learn more details from my National Pet Week post from earlier this week!

If you have tried any of the above tutorials, share pics of your final products below! What kinds of DIY’s do you enjoy making for your kits or pups?
